summary: Bob Morris delivers a great-sounding tape of a solid 1984 show, praised for both the recording and the performance.
review: The reviewer calls this a "great recording" and notes it was a good show for ’84, highlighting Bob Morris' reputation for quality tapes. No specific song or technical issues are mentioned, indicating a generally enjoyable listening experience with clear sound.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) describes the show as good and the recording as great; without detailed technical or musical critique, a solid but not outstanding rating is appropriate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a "great recording" with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a good 1984 performance; no specific comments on pacing or set structure.
